red_test.reason: Control-plane storage and GC behavior is audited through existing Rust tests without changing server or storage code

targeted_test.command: ulimit -n 4096; cargo test -p ao2-cp-server --test gc_smoke --offline && cargo test -p ao2-cp-storage --offline
targeted_test.output: Six GC smoke tests and storage atomic-write, orphan-sweep, index, and retention tests passed.

integration_test.output: Complete control-plane workspace passed after raising only the shell-local file-descriptor limit from 256 to 4096; release-publication 29/29 and all workspace tests passed.

status_test.output: Control-plane clippy passed with warnings denied.

next_test.command: source inspection of BundleStore atomic publication and Storage::prune_retention
next_test.output: Bundle writes use temp-file/fsync/rename; prune deletes candidates then rewrites the index, with normal and idempotent behavior covered but no crash journal.

objective: Coordinate ao2-control-plane Control plane transactional GC test through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
